title: If You Use Agent Zero, This Video is for You (EPIC FAIL)
summary: Jordan Urbs documents a failed attempt to build an AI-generated ad campaign using Agent Zero, encountering LiteLLM errors and critical crashes that made the framework unusable. The video serves as a cautionary critique of Agent Zero's reliability for production workflows, while demonstrating techniques like custom skill installation, Venice AI model routing, and workflow configuration that viewers can learn from the failure.
